text:
There once was a clumsy squirrel named Skippy. He had the best intentions, but his adventures often ended with a cascade through a berry bush. One day, while searching for his favorite nut stash, Skippy stumbled upon a peculiar patch of snow.

The snow sparkled with lights. This wasn't just snowflakes; it was magical snow. Skippy couldn't believe his eyes—Ignoring his own peril, he gathered a handful and leaped onto a patch of flowers.

The next thing he knew, he was floating. The lights seemed to whirl around him. Then, surprisingly, he found himself back at his nut stash. He had fallen onto a bunch of glittery berries. His paw got stuck.

"Blast!" he screeched as he tried to free himself. It seemed like hours when all of a sudden a friendly, old owl swooped down. With a cluck of delight, the owl helped him free his paw.
